---
title: "Research"
---

```{=html}
<!-- UNCOMMENT THE SECTION BELOW WHEN YOUR JOB MARKET PAPER IS READY
### Job Market Paper

---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple" icon=false}
**Paper Title Here**

One to two sentence summary of the paper and its key finding.

[Paper](link-to-pdf){.btn .btn-primary .basic} [Slides](link-to-slides){.btn .btn-primary .basic}
:::
-->
```

## Publications

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r,message=F,echo=F,warning=F}
#| results: asis

library(tidyverse)
library(glue)
library(data.table)
library(here)

df<-readxl::read_xlsx(here("pubs","pubs.xlsx"))%>%
  data.table()

# Fix Unicode escape sequences from xlsx encoding
fix_unicode <- function(x) {
  if (!is.character(x)) return(x)
  x <- gsub("<U\\+2014>", "\u2014", x)
  x <- gsub("<U\\+2013>", "\u2013", x)
  x <- gsub("<U\\+2019>", "\u2019", x)
  x <- gsub("<U\\+2018>", "\u2018", x)
  x <- gsub("<U\\+00A0>", " ", x)
  x <- gsub("\u00a0", " ", x)
  x <- gsub("<U\\+2212>", "\u2212", x)
  x <- gsub("<U\\+202F>", " ", x)
  x <- gsub("<U\\+2009>", " ", x)
  # Also replace actual unicode characters with HTML entities
  x <- gsub("\u2014", "&mdash;", x)
  x <- gsub("\u2013", "&ndash;", x)
  x <- gsub("\u2019", "&rsquo;", x)
  x <- gsub("\u2018", "&lsquo;", x)
  x <- gsub("\u2212", "&#8722;", x)
  x <- gsub("\u202f", " ", x)
  x <- gsub("\u2009", " ", x)
  x
}
df <- df[, lapply(.SD, fix_unicode)]

if (nrow(df) == 0) stop("No publications found in pubs.xlsx")

gluefun <- function(df) {
  has_abstract <- !is.na(df$abstract) & nchar(trimws(df$abstract)) > 0
  abstract_html <- if (has_abstract) {
    glue('
    <a
    type="button"
    class="btn btn-primary basic"
    data-bs-toggle="collapse"
    data-bs-target="#collapse{df$short_id}"
    aria-expanded="false"
    aria-controls="collapseExample"
    >
    Abstract
    </a>
<div class="collapse" id="collapse{df$short_id}">
  <div class="card card-body">
    {df$abstract}
  </div>
</div>')
  } else { "" }
  glue('<span> {df$authors}. {df$year}. [{df$title}]({df$link}). <em>{df$journal}</em>.</span>{abstract_html}<div style="margin-bottom: 1.25rem;"></div>')%>%print()
}



for (i in 1:nrow(df[,.N,year])) {
  y<-df[,.N,year][order(-year)][i,year]
  pubs_y<-df[year==y]
  print(glue(""))
  print(glue('### {y}'))
  pubs_y[order(date)]%>%
    split(1:nrow(pubs_y))%>%
    walk(gluefun)
}
```

```{=html}
<!-- HIDDEN: Other Articles
## Other Articles

---

Mark Meiselbach, **Matthew Lavallee**. 2026. [H.R.1 Threatens The Stability Of Medicaid Managed Care](https://www.healthaffairs.org/content/forefront/h-r-1-threatens-stability-medicaid-managed-care). *Health Affairs Forefront*.
-->
```

```{=html}
<!-- HIDDEN: Work in Progress
## Work in Progress

---

**The Effect of Specialty Network Breadth: Evidence from Random Assignment in Medicaid Managed Care**

**Does Generosity Matter? Evidence from the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program**

**The Effect of Network Adequacy Standards: Evidence from Medicare Advantage**
-->
```
